title: Vote
description: ZDev's VotePlugin is a universal plug—in for Minecraft Paper that allows players to collectively make decisions about various game events by voting.
body:
_Vote — a voting system for Minecraft servers_

**Vote is a mod that adds a convenient and flexible voting system to your Minecraft server. With it, you can easily organize surveys, make collective decisions, and increase player engagement.**

**Main functions:**

Create and manage votes right in the game
Support for different types of voting (yes/no, multiple choice)
Customizable access rights for creating and participating in votes
Automatic announcement of the results in the chat
Integration with popular server plugins and mods
Localization (multi-language support)
User-friendly and intuitive interface

**Why use Vote?**

Simplifies decision-making on the server (for example, choosing a mini-game, changing rules, organizing events)
Increases interaction between players
Makes server management more democratic and transparent

**Why choose this particular mod?**

Easy setup and integration
Active support and regular updates
Open source code
Vote is the perfect choice for servers where every player's opinion is important!
